input_dict.question: What number of male band members do both Juliette and the Licks and Civil Twilight have?
input_dict.source_summary: Both Juliette and the Licks and Civil Twilight have four male band members. Juliette and the Licks — other band members have included guitarist Craig Fairbaugh, guitarist Emilio Cueto, bassist Jason Womack, and drummer Ed Davis. Civil Twilight is a four-piece rock band consisting of the brothers Andrew and Steven McKellar, plus Richard Wouters and Kevin Dailey.
input_dict.target_summary: Juliette & The Licks: an American rock band led by actress and singer Juliette Lewis. Other band members have included guitarist Craig Fairbaugh, guitarist Emilio Cueto, bassist Jason Womack, and drummer Ed Davis. Civil Twilight: a four-piece rock band consisting of the brothers Andrew and Steven McKellar, plus Richard Wouters and Kevin Dailey. To determine the number of male members for each band, the genders of the listed members must be confirmed (the Civil Twilight entry explicitly identifies Andrew and Steven as brothers).
input_dict.candidate_summary: Juliette & The Licks: an American rock band led by actress and singer Juliette Lewis. Other band members have included guitarist Craig Fairbaugh, guitarist Emilio Cueto, bassist Jason Womack, and drummer Ed Davis. Civil Twilight: a four-piece rock band consisting of the brothers Andrew and Steven McKellar, plus Richard Wouters and Kevin Dailey. To determine the number of male members for each band, the genders of the listed members must be confirmed (the Civil Twilight entry explicitly identifies Andrew and Steven as brothers).
